generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure highlighted specific vulnerabilities in our alliances, reinforcing concerns about burden-sharing. The data points about defense tests and response rates made the issue feel more urgent and tangible, nudging my opinion slightly more supportive of stronger alliance commitments.

request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While we debate alliance commitments, other nations are exploiting our divisions. Last year alone, [redacted] intelligence reports show [specific adversary] tested our defenses 147 times - and our partners only responded to 32%. When was the last time you heard our leaders admit we're carrying more than our share? #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurden
